Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait across all process variants containing this activity
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Total time spent in Accepted + Wait when followed by Completed + In Call compared to when followed by Completed + Resolved
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Minimum time for Accepted + Wait in variants that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Average duration of Accepted + Wait grouped by country
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and the end of case grouped by the last value of organization country

Name: Time from Accepted + Wait to Completed + In Call in variants where both activities occur consecutively
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Elapsed time between Queued + Awaiting Assignment and Accepted + Wait in variants leading to Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Cycle time of Accepted + Wait in cases that eventually reach Completed + In Call versus those that reach Completed + Closed without passing through Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Average time it takes Accepted + Wait to be completed after Accepted + In Progress in variants that contain Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Total waiting time accumulated in Accepted + Wait for cases with impact level 'High' compared to 'Low'
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Time of Accepted + Wait when preceded by Accepted + Assigned versus when preceded directly by Accepted + In Progress, specifically in variants ending with Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Minimum time between Accepted + Wait and the next occurrence of Accepted + In Progress in variants that later include Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Average duration of Accepted + Wait in variants where Completed + In Call appears as an intermediate resolution step before final closure
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Time from case start until Accepted + Wait in variants that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Total time for Accepted + Wait in variants that loop back to Accepted + In Progress before reaching Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Elapsed time between Accepted + Wait and Completed + Resolved in cases that bypass Completed + In Call, contrasted with those that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'
